allow: PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev","--","--host" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\jkinard\\Desktop\\wedding-site" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $result = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/wedding-site" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($result\) { "OK: $\($result.StatusCode\)" } else { "Checking 4322..."; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4322/wedding-site" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r2\) { "OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\) on 4322" } else { "Server still starting" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/wedding-site" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $body = $r.Content; $checks = @{ "Pinyon Script font" = $body -match "Pinyon\\+Script"; "No Herr Von" = -not \($body -match "Herr\\+Von"\); "end-photo-section" = $body -match "end-photo-section"; "christmas-divider-img" = $body -match "christmas-divider-img"; "no pine SVG" = -not \($body -match "x1=`"6`" y1=`"18`""\) }; $checks.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/wedding-site" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $b = $r.Content; $checks = [ordered]@{ "Italianno font" = $b -match "Italianno"; "site-title" = $b -match "site-title"; "header-top-bar" = $b -match "header-top-bar"; "header-monogram" = $b -match "header-monogram"; "Ceremony nav link" = $b -match '/#ceremony'; "Reception nav link" = $b -match '/#reception'; "Travel nav link" = $b -match '/#where-to-stay'; "id=ceremony anchor" = $b -match 'id="ceremony"'; "id=reception anchor" = $b -match 'id="reception"'; "No hero-monogram img" = -not \($b -match 'class="hero-monogram"'\) }; $checks.GetEnumerator\(\) | % { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" } } else { "Server not responding" })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/wedding-site/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $reynaPos = $html.IndexOf\("Lizeth Reyna"\); $sanchezPos = $html.IndexOf\("Alexiz Sanchez"\); $trevinoPos = $html.IndexOf\("Claryssa Trevino"\); $vasquezPos = $html.IndexOf\("Sarah Vasquez"\); "Reyna:$reynaPos Sanchez:$sanchezPos Trevino:$trevinoPos Vasquez:$vasquezPos \(ascending = correct\)"; $lbPos = $html.IndexOf\("lightbox"\); "Lightbox found: $\($lbPos -gt 0\)")

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/wedding-site/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).Content; @\("min-width: 250px", "250px", "#1a2e1a"\) | ForEach-Object { if \($html -match [regex]::Escape\($_\)\) { "FOUND in HTML: $_" } else { "NOT IN HTML: $_" } })

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch "Loopback" -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch "^169" } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize)
